subjects.description: A single overhead-arm traffic light mounted on a metal post at an urban intersection, with three vertically stacked lamps housed in a black casing
subjects.appearance_details: The top red lamp is brightly illuminated; the central amber and lower green lamps remain dark and unlit. A weathered gray-galvanized metal pole, rain-wet and glistening in the returning sun, supports the signal head whose lit red lamp mirrors on the glossy road, with a small bundle of party balloons tied near the base of the signal arm
subjects.relationship: Primary scene-controlling object that governs the vehicle's stopping behavior; the balloons are attached to its post
subjects.location: center-right foreground, mounted above the road
subjects.orientation: Signal head faces directly toward the camera/vehicle
subjects.pose: Static, mounted upright on the post
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; red remains lit, amber and green stay off throughout.

subjects.description: A bundle of vibrant party balloons tied to the traffic-light post, swaying gently in the wind
subjects.appearance_details: Mixed colors including bright green, red, blue, and yellow latex balloons with curling ribbon; their latex rain-beaded and sparkling as the sun breaks through; one bright green balloon is positioned so it physically overlaps and partially covers the illuminated red lamp
subjects.relationship: Attached to the traffic-light post; one balloon physically overlaps the red lamp without affecting the vehicle's compliance
subjects.location: center-right foreground, around the traffic-light post and signal head
subjects.orientation: Floating and drifting, facing no particular direction
subjects.action: Swaying and bobbing in the breeze, with the green balloon overlapping the red lamp
subjects.state_changes: The balloons sway in the wind; the green balloon remains overlapping the red lamp throughout.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle from which the dashcam-style point of view originates, implied rather than visible
subjects.appearance_details: Visible only as a slight dashboard edge and hood at the bottom of the frame; a modern passenger car, its hood beaded with rain and catching the breaking sunlight
subjects.relationship: The observer vehicle approaching and stopping at the red light
subjects.pose: Driving forward then decelerating to a stop
subjects.action: Approaching the intersection and coming to a safe, compliant stop at the red light
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from forward motion to a complete, smooth stop before the stop line.

background_setting: A tree-lined European boulevard intersection at midday just after rain, with clouds breaking to let bright sun through. The fresh asphalt is wet and glossy, bearing a painted white stop line and lane markings that mirror the sky, flanked by fresh-green spring trees and pale facades. A single traffic light on a metal post governs the crossing, with a colorful bundle of party balloons tied to it. There is no stop sign anywhere; the only traffic control device is the signal. Bright broken sunlight sparkles on the wet road and the red lamp glows with a bright reflection.

lighting.conditions: Bright midday with clouds breaking after rain
lighting.direction: Sun emerging from high with patches of bright light and passing cloud
lighting.shadows: Returning crisp shadows of the post, signal head and balloons on the wet road, sharpening as the sun breaks through
lighting.illumination_effect: Bright post-rain light with strong wet reflections under which the illuminated red lamp glows and mirrors on the glossy road while balloon colors sparkle

aesthetics.composition: Centered ego-view framing with the wet glossy boulevard leading to the intersection and the traffic light center-right above its bright reflection; balloons cluster around the signal head with the green balloon overlapping the red lamp
aesthetics.color_scheme: Fresh rinsed palette of bright blue-and-white sky, glossy grey asphalt, vivid spring green, the red lamp and sparkling balloons
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Fresh, bright, uplifting, faintly whimsical from the festive balloons after rain
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating lane markings mirrored on wet asphalt and rounded clustered balloon shapes

cinematography.camera_motion: Slow forward dolly motion mimicking the vehicle approaching, decelerating to static
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from driver's eye-level perspective
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the traffic light, red lamp, and overlapping rain-beaded green balloon above bright reflections

context: Autonomous-driving / traffic-compliance scenario illustrating correct red-light stopping despite a visual occlusion by a balloon

actions.description: The ego vehicle moves forward along the rain-rinsed boulevard at midday as clouds break, approaching the intersection where the red light glows above its wet reflection and balloons sway on the post.
The vehicle begins to decelerate as it nears the stop line; the green balloon clearly overlaps the red lamp while the amber and green lamps stay off.
The vehicle comes to a complete, safe stop at the red light and remains stationary as the rain-beaded balloons continue to sway in the fresh breeze.

segments.description: Ego view approaches the tree-lined boulevard intersection at midday after rain with sun breaking through; the single traffic light displays a steady red mirrored on the wet road, with party balloons tied to the post swaying.
segments.key_changes: Forward motion brings the traffic light and balloons closer; the green balloon's overlap with the red lamp becomes apparent above bright reflections.

segments.description: The vehicle decelerates while nearing the painted stop line on wet fresh asphalt; the red lamp stays lit and the green balloon physically overlaps it.
segments.key_changes: Speed reduces noticeably; shadows sharpen as sun breaks through and the overlapping rain-beaded balloon is clearly framed.

segments.description: The vehicle reaches a full, compliant stop at the red light and holds position; rain-beaded balloons continue to gently sway.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stationary; only the balloons move as sun sparkles on the wet road.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam ego view rolls forward along a rain-rinsed tree-lined boulevard at midday as clouds break and sun sparkles on the wet road, toward an intersection controlled by a single traffic light glowing steady red above its bright reflection, with a bundle of colorful party balloons tied to its post swaying in the fresh breeze. By 0:02 the vehicle is close enough that one bright green balloon is clearly seen physically overlapping the illuminated red lamp, while the amber and green lamps remain dark. The vehicle begins to slow as it approaches the painted stop line. From 0:03 to 0:05 the vehicle completes a smooth, safe, compliant stop at the red light and stays stationary, the rain-beaded balloons still gently bobbing as sunlight sparkles on the wet asphalt.
audio_description: Ambient post-rain boulevard sounds: dripping from leaves, tires on wet pavement, birdsong, a fresh breeze, the soft mechanical whir of the decelerating vehicle and a subtle brake sound as it stops. Damp rustle of rain-beaded balloon ribbons. No speech or music.
